w0-1-what-is-a-widget.prompt: Placeholder exercise. The function below is supposed to count the parts in a synthetic widget but always returns 0. Describe the bug and how you would fix it — in your own words.
w0-1-what-is-a-widget.canonical_fix: Placeholder fix: the accumulator `total` is reset to 0 on every loop iteration, so only the last increment survives. Move the `total = 0` initialization outside the loop so the count accumulates.

misconceptions.name: Resets the accumulator inside the loop
Thinks the function returns too early
